facts.subject: python_requirements
facts.fact: Requires Python >=3.9; runtime dependencies: pytz, python-dateutil
facts.reason: Needed to run converters and parse timezones reliably. Future tooling should install these before running tests or converters.

facts.subject: css_loading
facts.fact: conv_to_eml loads converted.css from the module directory at import time
facts.reason: Converters must be run from the repository root or ensure converted.css is present in the CWD unless code is changed.

facts.subject: chat_convert
facts.fact: bin/chat_convert is the Adium/XML/HTML CLI and accepts --clobber, --attach, --no-background, and --debug.
facts.reason: Documents how to run the legacy converter with the new script name.

facts.subject: ndjson_cli
facts.fact: bin/json_to_eml is the NDJSON CLI; supports --stream, --stream-tempdir, --embed-attachments, --local-handle, --no-background, --clobber, and segmentation options (idle-hours/max-messages/max-days).
facts.reason: Explains how to run the NDJSON converter and available flags for streaming and attachment embedding.

facts.subject: date_policy
facts.fact: Parser coerces unparseable/missing message dates to UTC epoch (1970-01-01T00:00:00Z) and ensures timezone-aware datetimes
facts.reason: Preserves deterministic ordering and Message-ID generation. Future changes to date fallback policy should be explicit.

facts.subject: participant_normalization
facts.fact: Participant entries (strings or dicts) are normalized; keys tried: id, identifier, handle, address, username, phone, value
facts.reason: Avoids passing dict objects into Conversation.add_participant and ensures consistent participant userids.

facts.subject: reactions
facts.fact: Reactions are grouped and rendered as inline HTML badges (emoji×count) when possible, with textual fallback; reactions targeting messages outside the segment become system events
facts.reason: Explains reaction rendering behavior for consumers of .eml HTML.

facts.subject: streaming
facts.fact: Streaming mode shards NDJSON into per-chat temporary files to avoid large memory usage; auto-enabled for large files.
facts.reason: Important for processing large exports without OOM.

facts.subject: tests
facts.fact: Unit tests under tests/ cover reaction rendering, embedding attachments, streaming parsing, and conv_to_eml edge cases. Run with: python3 -m unittest tests/test_imessage_json.py tests/test_conv_to_eml.py
facts.reason: How to validate behavior before and after changes.
